name: icon-input
title: Icon Input
description: An Iconify-backed icon picker with a popover command menu, live preview, and localized empty states.
docs:
## Overview

`IconInput` is a controlled icon picker for any [Iconify](https://icon-sets.iconify.design/) collection. It renders the selected icon as an outline button, opens a searchable shadcn command menu, and returns the selected icon name without its collection prefix. Search results are loaded through an Effect Atom and `HttpClient`; trace propagation is disabled only for the cross-origin Iconify request so browser CORS preflights remain simple. The Iconify catalogue link is generated from the selected collection.

## Features

- Controlled `value` and `onValueChange` props
- Lucide Icons collection by default
- Searchable Command menu in a Popover
- Live selected-icon preview
- English and French built-in copy based on the active Paraglide locale
- Fixed-height results area to avoid layout shifts

## Usage

```tsx
import { useState } from "react";
import { IconInput } from "@/components/ui/icon-input";

const [icon, setIcon] = useState("circle-help");

<IconInput value={icon} onValueChange={setIcon} />
```

## Other Collections

Pass an Iconify collection prefix. The picker derives its matching Iconify catalogue link automatically, and `onValueChange` receives the unprefixed icon name.

```tsx
<IconInput
  collection="mdi"
  value={icon}
  onValueChange={setIcon}
/>
```

## Requirements

The component uses the active Paraglide locale through `getLocale()`. Install it in a Paraglide-enabled application and ensure `button`, `command`, and `popover` are available from shadcn.
